site.title: QuakeOverlay
site.description: Earthquake information overlay for OBS streaming

home.heroTitle: Never miss earthquake information during your stream.
home.heroSubtitle:
QuakeOverlay automatically fetches earthquake data
and displays it on your OBS stream overlay.
Stay informed and share earthquake information with your viewers during streams.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for earthquake info on stream

realtime.title: Earthquake Alerts
realtime.description: Automatically fetches earthquake data and displays it on your stream overlay. Keep your viewers informed during streams.

overlay.title: OBS Overlay
overlay.description: Easily add as a browser source in OBS. Designed to blend naturally into your stream.

customize.title: Customization
customize.description: Fine-tune display position, size, intensity threshold, and more to your preference.

multilang.title: Multi-language
multilang.description: Supports Japanese, English, and Korean. Share earthquake info with international viewers.

download.title: Download
download.description: Download from Booth and extract the ZIP file.

configure.title: Configure
configure.description: Launch the app and set your preferred intensity level and display position.

stream.title: Start Streaming
stream.description: Add a browser source in OBS, set the URL, and you're ready to go.

reviews.title: User Reviews
reviews.subtitle: What users are saying about QuakeOverlay

cta.title: Get Started Now
cta.subtitle: Download and display earthquake info on your stream

footer.description: Earthquake information overlay tool for OBS streaming

docs.title: Documentation
docs.noResultsHint: Searching titles, descriptions, and body text. Try a different or shorter keyword.
